Operation 'Campaigns_Get' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary uses backticks unnecessarily and is generic. Description lacks detail about what is returned and how pagination/filtering work. Enhanced version clarifies the operation returns a paginated collection, explains parameter purposes, and specifies the response format for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Get campaigns with paging, sorting and filtering
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve campaigns with filtering and pagination
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of Campaign objects with support for sorting and filtering. Supports multiple query parameters for filtering campaign properties, pagination controls for result set management, and sorting options for result ordering. Returns a paginated collection of Campaign objects matching the specified criteria.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses backticks unnecessarily and is generic. Description lacks detail about what is returned and how pagination/filtering work. Enhanced version clarifies the operation returns a paginated collection, explains parameter purposes, and specifies the response format for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'Campaigns_Post' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate, but description only explains ID generation behavior without clarifying what the operation does, what is returned, or the side effect of creating a new campaign record. Enhanced description provides complete context about inputs, outputs, and state changes for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description:
The server generates id of new campaign automatically, so any value
provided for id property with campaign object parameter is ignored
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new Campaign object with the provided properties. The server automatically generates a unique campaign ID, so any id value provided in the request body is ignored. Returns the newly created Campaign object with the server-generated ID and default status. This operation creates a new campaign record in the system.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description only explains ID generation behavior without clarifying what the operation does, what is returned, or the side effect of creating a new campaign record. Enhanced description provides complete context about inputs, outputs, and state changes for AI agent clarity.
